title: University of Southampton Delhi Campus Tour Event Details
text: Open day and campus tour 24 July SELLING FAST Event Status: Completed Date & Time: July 24, 2025 4:00 PM IST Location: International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India Book now Campus tour Join us for an exciting in-person event at University of Southampton Delhi where you can explore our state-of-the-art facilities and get a feel for campus life. This is your chance to experience first hand what it’s like to be a part of our vibrant community. Don’t miss out on this opportunity to discover all that the University of Southampton has to offer. International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India Open address in Google Maps
summary: This section details the completed University of Southampton Delhi Campus Tour on July 24, 2025, an in-person event for exploring campus facilities and experiencing university life.
